it:36.3: "Nayidaṁ, bhikkhave, brahmacariyaṁ vussati janakuhanatthaṁ, na janalapanatthaṁ, na lābhasakkārasilokānisaṁsatthaṁ, na ‘iti maṁ jano jānātū’ti. Atha kho idaṁ, bhikkhave, brahmacariyaṁ vussati abhiññatthañceva pariññatthañcā"ti. Etamatthaṁ bhagavā avoca. Tatthetaṁ iti vuccati:
it:36.4:
"Abhiññatthaṁ pariññatthaṁ,
brahmacariyaṁ anītihaṁ;
Adesayi so bhagavā,
nibbānogadhagāminaṁ.
it:36.6:
Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.
Navamaṁ.
